topics.title: JavaScript Package Management Insights
topics.summary: An enjoyable evening with talented individuals hosted by @sylwia.bsky.social and @willow.sh focused on the future of JavaScript package management. The event fostered insightful conversations that could influence upcoming trends and practices in the field.

topics.title: Streaming Experiences on @stream.place
topics.summary: A personal reflection on the first streaming experience by @willow.sh on @stream.place. The post shares thoughts and insights gained from the experience, highlighting the evolving nature of content creation and audience engagement in digital spaces.
